login_card.title: Welcome~

status.login_fail: Login failed, please check your credentials:

login_card.question_alert: Rest assured that your account is secure. I cannot see anyone's password. If you don't believe me, you can ask me for the worker code and the database file of the D1 repository.

create_block.title: Add Study Log
create_block.create_sub: Click to expand full-screen editing (supports auto-saving drafts, Ctrl/⌘ + Enter to save quickly)

footer.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This action cannot be undone. Please type 'I am sure I want to delete' to confirm.
footer.delete_confirm_text: I am sure I want to delete
footer.text_wrong:
The confirmation text is incorrect, deletion cancelled
XIXI I knew you wouldn't want to delete me (>w<)

setting.confirm_delete: This is a bold decision, but I respect your choice. Please confirm again whether to switch the 'Confirm before delete' setting.

header.title: Settings
header.desc: General and appearance settings are saved locally only

page_size.title: Default items per page
page_size.desc: How many records to load by default when opening lists

sort_order.title: Default sort order
sort_order.desc: Which order records are displayed by default

auto_draft.title: Auto-save drafts
auto_draft.desc: Automatically save drafts locally while editing to prevent data loss

draft_interval.title: Draft save interval
draft_interval.desc: How many seconds between automatic draft saves ({n}s)

confirm_delete.title: Confirm before delete
confirm_delete.desc: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting records

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Enable global shortcuts like Ctrl/⌘+Enter to save, Esc to close

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.desc: Affects how study time is displayed in records

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Switch between light and dark mode

card_layout.title: Card layout
card_layout.desc: Choose between grid, list or compact layouts

animation.title: UI animations
animation.desc: Disable transitions and animations (for low-performance devices)

border_radius.title: Corner style
border_radius.desc: Preferred corner radius for cards and buttons

preview_lines.title: Card preview lines
preview_lines.desc: Maximum number of preview lines shown inside each card

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.desc: Set a display name (does not affect login email)

password.title: Change password
password.desc: Change the password for your account

email.title: Change email
email.desc: Change the email address associated with your account

export.title: Export data
export.desc: Export all study logs as a JSON file for backup or migration. Each export action is limited to once per hour.
export.locked: Export is locked, please try again in {s} seconds

import.title: Import data
import.desc: Import study logs from a JSON file (will merge with existing records)

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.desc: View and manage currently logged-in devices and sessions

clear_data.title: Clear all data
clear_data.desc: Delete all study logs; this action is irreversible

delete_account.title: Delete account
delete_account.desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

daily_reminder.title: Daily study reminder
daily_reminder.desc: Send a daily notification reminding you to log your study

reminder_time.title: Reminder time
reminder_time.desc: What time of day to remind you to write a study log

streak_reminder.title: Streak reminder
streak_reminder.desc: Remind you when you miss several days in a row to avoid breaking your streak

weekly_report.title: Weekly report
weekly_report.desc: Generate a weekly summary of last week's study (local popup or email)

check_update.title: Check for updates
check_update.desc: Check whether a new version is available

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.desc: Have questions or suggestions? Email the developer

source.title: Source code
source.desc: View the project source on GitHub

reset.title: Reset all settings
reset.desc: Restore all settings to their default values
reset.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This will restore all preferences to their default values. You can change them again after resetting.

mainPage.title: Go to Main Page
mainPage.desc: Return to the main page to see more features

status.page_size_set: Default items per page set to {n}
status.draft_interval_set: Draft save interval set to {n} seconds
status.export_success: Data exported successfully! Filename format: what-ive-done-export-{timestamp}.json
status.clear_data_confirm: Please confirm whether you want to clear all data? This action is irreversible, please type 'I am sure I want to clear' to confirm
status.clear_data_confirm_text: I am sure I want to clear
status.delete_account_confirm: Please confirm whether you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible, please type 'I am sure I want to delete my account' to confirm
status.delete_account_confirm_text: I am sure I want to delete my account
status.reset_done: All settings restored to defaults; reload the page for full effect

content.reciting: Reciting (Template): Recited [  ] for [  ] minutes, aiming to fully recall and remember the key points; current mastery: [  ]; problems encountered: [  ]; next improvement: [  ]
content.reading: Reading (Template): Read page/section [  ] of [  ], summary: [  ]; key takeaways: [  ]; next steps: [  ]
content.coding: Coding (Template): Implemented [  ] (approximately [  ] lines of code), resolved [  ]; testing status: [  ]; deployment/reproduction method: [  ]; remaining tasks: [  ]
content.homework: Homework (Template): Completed homework for [  ], including [  ] problems/items; difficulties: [  ]; solution approach or key points: [  ]; areas to review: [  ]
content.assignment: Assignment/Project (Template): Delivered for [  ], achieved [  ]; took [  ] hours; key steps: [  ]; encountered risks/issues: [  ]; next plan: [  ]
content.course: Course/Lecture (Template): Attended lesson/unit [  ] of [  ], covered topics: [  ]; skills/concepts learned: [  ]; exercises or assignments: [  ]; application scenarios: [  ]
content.review: Review/Summary (Template): Reviewed the goals and outcomes of [  ]; successes: [  ]; issues: [  ]; cause analysis: [  ]; improvement measures and action items: [  ]; expected indicators: [  ]

goal.reciting: Have recited [  ] for [  ] minutes, aiming to fully recall and remember the key points; current mastery: [  ]; problems encountered: [  ]; next improvement: [  ]
goal.reading: Have read [  ] pages or [  ] articles, able to summarize [  ] and list important excerpts.
goal.coding: Have implemented [  ] (approximately [  ] lines of code), passed testing and can run/reproduce in the environment.
goal.homework: Have completed [  ] problems or [  ] projects, submitted and passed evaluation/testing, with problem-solving ideas attached.
goal.assignment: Have delivered [  ], achieved [  ], and recorded implementation steps and encountered issues.
goal.course: Have attended [  ] lessons/units, organized [  ], mastered [  ] and can apply it in practice.
goal.review: Have completed review: Reviewed the work/study of [  ], identified [  ], proposed [  ] and formulated improvement plans.

create.no_enough: Title and content cannot both be empty

success.total: The record has been created successfully! New record ID: {id}
success.part: The record has been created successfully! New record ID: {id} (The backend does not currently support extended fields and has been automatically compatible)

update.zbyisgod: have no this API yet, don't ask me to implement it QwQ

delete.success: The record has been deleted successfully! Deleted record ID: {id}

other.logout_error: Logout request failed (network or server error), but local session has been cleared. If you still see the logged-in status, it may be because the backend session was not successfully cleared. Please try refreshing the page or checking your network connection.
other.list_error: Not logged in, unable to load list

left.title: TITLE
left.placeholder: What problem do you want to solve this time?
left.title_placeholder: For example: Learning the word ABANDON

right.title: DETAILS
right.placeholder: Write down what you did, what you learned, where you got stuck, and what the next step is...
right.suggest: Tip: Write in four sections: “Conclusion / Process / Reflection / Next Step” for faster review later.
